title: calochortus eurycarpus
intro: Calochortus eurycarpus, also known as the giant mariposa lily or great mariposa lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Liliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and bulbs are used to treat various health issues. The roots of the Calochortus eurycarpus contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced pain and improved wound healing. In herbal preparations, the roots are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
